message:
Port read_bitz and write_bitz to neo (#6050) ## 🔍 Problem - `read_bitz` and `write_bitz` still use the legacy executor. - That leaves the BITZ format unavailable on the new execution path. ## 🛠️ Solution - Add new-executor implementations for `read_bitz` and `write_bitz`. - Keep the legacy parser, printer, and factory path for backward compatibility. - Add focused regression tests for round trips and truncated or invalid BITZ frames. ## 💬 Review - Please focus on the direct Feather stream decode and encode logic in the neo path. - I ran `uvx tenzir-test --root test --match operators/bitz`. 📚 Docs PR: tenzir/docs#270
✅ Closes TNZ-112, TNZ-113

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+ABCD
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+error: unexpected BITZ magic
+ --> tests/operators/bitz/error_invalid_magic.tql:5:3
+  |
+5 |   read_bitz
+  |   ^^^^^^^^^ 
+  |
+  = note: expected TNZ1

@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+TNZ1
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+error: unexpected BITZ header length 0
+ --> tests/operators/bitz/error_missing_header.tql:5:3
+  |
+5 |   read_bitz
+  |   ^^^^^^^^^ 
+  |
+  = note: expected 8

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+error: unexpected 1 trailing bytes in BITZ payload
+ --> tests/operators/bitz/error_trailing_garbage.tql:5:3
+  |
+5 |   read_bitz
+  |   ^^^^^^^^^ 
+  |
+  = note: failed to consume the entire Feather stream

@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+TNZ1abc
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+error: unexpected BITZ header length 3
+ --> tests/operators/bitz/error_truncated_header.tql:5:3
+  |
+5 |   read_bitz
+  |   ^^^^^^^^^ 
+  |
+  = note: expected 8
